statement: Source of truth — Backend/database is the official version truth. Local state/cache is only a temporary — Affects versions.service.ts, builder queries, useBuilderNodes.ts, version loading, autosave
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User can trust that “Synced” means the backend
